identity.name: S.E.N.T.I.N.E.L.
identity.description: Secure Email Network for Threat Identification & Neural Evaluation Logic

design_principles: Fusion: Mix Military HUD precision with Modern SaaS usability
Emotion: Instill a sense of 'Control' and 'Vigilance'
Content: Data is the hero. Legibility of logs and scores is paramount
Zoom: High density for data, but clear focus on critical alerts
Contrast: High contrast for readability in dark environments (Cyber-Safety)

typography.installation: Import fonts via Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Chivo:wght@300;400;700;900&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap');

usage_rules: Backgrounds must be deep navy/slate (Slate 950), never pure black unless for terminal windows.
Use Cyan (Cyan 500) for 'Safe' or 'System Normal' indicators.
Use Purple (Indigo 500) for 'AI/Neural' related elements (scores, analysis).

layout.spacing: Generous padding (p-6, p-8) inside containers, tight gaps (gap-4) between data panels.

containers.terminal: bg-black border border-slate-800 font-mono text-sm p-4 overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar

buttons.primary: bg-cyan-600 hover:bg-cyan-500 text-white font-mono uppercase tracking-wider text-xs rounded-sm shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(6,182,212,0.5)] transition-all
buttons.destructive: bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-500 text-white font-mono uppercase tracking-wider text-xs rounded-sm shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(239,68,68,0.5)]
buttons.outline: border border-slate-700 hover:border-cyan-500 text-slate-300 hover:text-cyan-400 bg-transparent font-mono uppercase text-xs rounded-sm

components.inputs: bg-slate-900/50 border-slate-700 focus:border-cyan-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-cyan-500 text-slate-200 font-mono rounded-sm placeholder:text-slate-600

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use 'backdrop-blur-md' and 'bg-opacity-50' for panels to show depth.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px borders are mandatory for all containers. Use 'border-slate-800' as default.
visual_enhancers.glows: Use subtle drop shadows with colors for active states: 'shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(6,182,212,0.15)]'.
visual_enhancers.scanlines: Optional: Add a subtle scanline overlay on the terminal window using CSS gradients.

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react'. Preferred icons: Shield, Lock, Activity, Terminal, AlertTriangle, Eye, Server, Cpu, Network.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL DEPENDENCIES: Run 'yarn add recharts' immediately. The dashboard requires charts.
2. UPDATE CSS: Replace the content of '/app/frontend/src/index.css' with the CSS variables provided in the 'colors' section. Ensure you keep the @tailwind directives.
3. UPDATE TAILWIND: Update '/app/frontend/tailwind.config.js' to extend the font family with Chivo, Inter, and JetBrains Mono.
4. FILE EXTENSIONS: Use '.js' or '.jsx' for all React files. Do NOT use '.tsx'.
5. LAYOUT: Implement the 'Control Room' grid for the main dashboard. Use the 'terminal' style for the Live Monitor.
6. CHARTS: Use 'recharts' for the Threat Statistics. Style them to match the dark theme (no white backgrounds).
7. MOCK DATA: Since the backend might not be ready, create a 'mockData.js' file to populate the dashboard with realistic cyber-threat data.
8. NAVIGATION: Create a sidebar navigation with the following links: Dashboard, Email Scanner, Live Monitor, Quarantine, Analytics, Config, Training.
9. TEST IDS: Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, nav links).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Use the 'Control Room' grid.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles (sharp corners for this project).
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable inside containers, but keep the grid tight.
